today_in_history_posts.title: p2p authentication and encryption BIPs
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The author has submitted two BIP drafts available on their Github.
- AES256-GCM was removed for Chacha20-Poly1305, with HMAC_SHA512 calculating cipher keys.
- Feedback is requested as the proposal, including a new message format, is under review.

today_in_history_posts.title: Laundry list of inter-peer wire protocol changes
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Reserving funds before locking improves transaction safety by preventing loss in non-existent routes.
- The reserving process, crucial for bi-directional payments, has diminished in importance with the community's shift towards Lightning.
- Integrating both source-routing and non-source routing could enhance privacy and network inclusivity.

today_in_history_posts.title: Unilateral Exit
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Implementing shared non-custodial UTXOs requires unilateral exit mechanisms for participant withdrawal.
- Merkle trees and cryptographic accumulators are proposed for efficient on-chain UTXO exits.
- The `OP_EXIT` opcode and `OP_TLUV` concept enable efficient exits and shared UTXO management.
